experiment_title: 蛋白质的硝酸反应实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="蛋白质的硝酸反应实验" goal="观察蛋白质（鸡蛋清溶液）与浓硝酸反应的显色现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="test_tube_clamp_1" type="test_tube_clamp" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Egg_White_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Concentrated_Nitric_Acid" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" reagent="Albumin" volume="2 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="HNO3" volume="5 drops" tool="dropper_1" id="step_2" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="test_tube_clamp_1" id="step_3" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_clamp_1" support="stand_1" id="step_4" />
      <Heat vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 量取蛋白质溶液并转移至试管，准备反应体系。
向试管中加入浓硝酸，为显色反应做准备。
将试管固定在试管夹和铁架台上，准备加热。
加热试管并等待反应，观察蛋白质与浓硝酸的显色现象。
